exhibits.name: Financial Statements (Hyatt Hotels Corporation)
exhibits.notes: Audited consolidated financials of parent. Includes Guarantee of Performance. Auditor: Deloitte & Touche LLP.

exhibits.name: Franchise Application
exhibits.notes: Includes payment instructions for application fee.

exhibits.name: Franchise Agreement (2025 Template)
exhibits.notes: Approximately 87 pages. Includes exhibits and riders. Key contract governing franchise relationship.

exhibits.name: Design and Construction Standards
exhibits.notes: Standards for new construction and renovation.

exhibits.name: State Administrators / Agents for Service of Process
Confidentiality Agreement
exhibits.notes: Must be signed during evaluation before receiving Confidential Information.

exhibits.name: List of Franchisees Who Left the System
exhibits.notes: Franchisees who had outlets terminated, canceled, transferred, or not renewed during most recent fiscal year.

exhibits.name: Comfort Letter
exhibits.notes: Required from each lender, ground lessor, and fee owner.

exhibits.name: Central Hotel Services by Hyatt Master Agreement
exhibits.notes: Governs all Central Services program schedules: Field Marketing, Revenue Management, Central Sales, GPGS, Digital Ancillary.

exhibits.name: State-Specific Additional Disclosures and Riders
exhibits.notes: States covered: California (unaudited franchisor balance sheet), Hawaii, Maryland, Minnesota, North Dakota. Includes franchise agreement riders and confidentiality agreement riders for MD, MN, ND.
